words.example: The company holds an annual meeting every December.

words.definition: A period of 100 years, usually counted from a year ending in 00.
words.example: The Eiffel Tower was built in the nineteenth century.

words.definition: A period of ten years, especially one beginning with a year that ends in a 0.
words.example: A lot has changed in the past decade.

words.definition: An amount of time during which something happens.
words.example: There was a short period of silence after the speech.

words.definition: To continue existing or happening for a particular time.
words.example: How long does the film last?

words.definition: Around a usual or ordinary level or standard.
words.example: The average temperature in summer is around 25 degrees.
Traffic is a major problem in big cities.
They paid a large sum of money for the house.

words.definition: An advantage you get from a situation.
words.example: One benefit of living in the city is good transport.

words.definition: To make something happen, usually something bad.
words.example: Smoking can cause serious health problems.

words.definition: To try to prevent something from happening, or to choose not to do something.
words.example: You should avoid eating too much sugar.

words.definition: The way that someone or something behaves.
words.example: Good behaviour is expected from all students.

words.definition: To stop something from happening or stop someone from doing something.
words.example: Washing your hands can prevent the spread of illness.

words.definition: To choose someone or something from a group.
words.example: Pick any book you like from the shelf.

words.definition: To show something by holding out your finger or a long thin object.
words.example: She pointed at the map to show us the route.
